title: The Psychogun Episode 1
overview: As Cobra escapes from stealing a diamond, he intercepts Professor Moore who is being targeted by members of the pirate guild. However, it's not the diamond they're after…

title: The Psychogun Episode 2
overview: Cobra and Professor Moore investigate a living fossil carrying an astonishing secret. Meanwhile, a skeletal figure, Crystal Boy, targets the professor.

title: The Psychogun Episode 3
overview: Crystal Boy closes in on the professor, and Cobra jumps in to save her. The pirate guild demands that they turn over the fossil data, or else.

title: The Psychogun Episode 4
overview: Count Cliff Bold's plan comes to light, and Cobra struggles to fight his way to rescue Professor Moore. With the fate of an entire galaxy at stake, Cobra can't afford to fail!
